description: Region-oriented benchmark matrix for Guangdong OSM + raster analysis

tasks.name: Create Fishnet
tasks.description: Preprocess: build a regular grid for region-based benchmarking

tasks.name: Create Random Points
tasks.description: Preprocess: generate random point sample within the region extent

tasks.name: Vector Buffer
tasks.description: Core vector analysis: buffer point features

tasks.name: Overlay Intersect
tasks.description: Core vector analysis: intersect offset polygon grids

tasks.name: Spatial Join
tasks.description: Core vector analysis: spatial join points to polygons

tasks.name: Calculate Field
tasks.description: Attribute analysis: calculate derived values over region data

tasks.name: Create Constant Raster
tasks.description: Raster baseline: create a uniform constant raster

tasks.name: Raster Resample
tasks.description: Raster analysis: resample analysis raster to a new cell size

tasks.name: Raster Clip/Mask
tasks.description: Raster analysis: clip the analysis raster by a centered window

tasks.name: Raster Calculator
tasks.description: Raster analysis: apply a simple raster arithmetic operation

tasks.name: Polygon to Raster
tasks.description: Mixed analysis: convert polygons to raster

tasks.name: Raster to Point
tasks.description: Mixed analysis: convert raster cells to points
